class.help: Administra los Resultados de los Tests
class.label: Resultados de Test
class.name: RES_TEST

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_res_test as oi_res_test, t0.c_res_test as c_res_test, t0.d_res_test as d_res_test, SEC.policy, t0.c_res_test as CODE, t0.d_res_test as TEXT FROM POS12_RES_TEST as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.ResultadosTests.RES_TEST\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_res_test LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_res_test asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_res_test as oi_res_test, SEC.policy FROM POS12_RES_TEST as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.ResultadosTests.RES_TEST\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_res_test LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_res_test asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.ResultadosTests.RES_TEST.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Postulantes.ResultadosTests.RES_TEST.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(POS12_RES_TEST.oi_res_test) as CNT from POS12_RES_TEST Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and POS12_RES_TEST.oi_res_test={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(POS12_RES_TEST.d_res_test,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(POS12_RES_TEST.c_res_test,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and [PARENT]={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW
